mapper.insert: insert into spring1board2 (bname, bpass, btitle, bcontent, bfile) values ( #{bname}, #{bpass}, #{btitle}, #{bcontent}, #{bfile} )
mapper.select: select * from spring1board2 order by bno desc
mapper.update: update spring1board2 set bhit = bhit+1 where bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: select bpass from spring1board2 where bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: update spring1board2 set btitle = #{btitle}, bcontent = #{bcontent}, bfile = #{bfile} where bno=#{bno}
mapper.select: select * from spring1board2 order by bno desc limit #{pstartno}, 12
select count(*) as cnt from spring1board2
select * from spring1board2 where btitle like concat('%', #{btitle}, '%') order by bno desc limit #{bno}, 10
select count(*) from spring1board2 where btitle like concat('%', #{btitle}, '%')
